Cape for Mia's Hideout

Obtain one for free by:

Joining the Mia's Hideout group!
https://www.roblox.com/communities/477030/Mias-Hideout#!/about

Joining the Mia's Hideout community server! (Optional, but raises your chances of getting one!)

Getting every badge in Demo's Furry Hangout (excluding for the "met mia" and "met demo" badges)

Happy Pride Month!

- Mia.
